betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Semiconductor Engineering: Basic Processor§f

§aThe Basic Processor is the brain of every QMD linear-class controller.§f
The §bBasic Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:4`) is the entry-tier QMD logic chip, used to craft every LINAC-class controller, detector, and target chamber controller. It is assembled in an §bNC Assembler§f from §bN-Type Doped Silicon§f, §bRedstone§f, §bGold§f, and §bSilver§f.

§6Recipe (QMDRecipes.java:503)§f:
Per `NCRecipes.assembler.addRecipe(...)`:
- Output: §b1 × Basic Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:4`)
- Input 1: §bN-Type Doped Silicon§f (`qmd:semiconductor:1`, 1 unit)
- Input 2: §bRedstone§f (`dustRedstone`, 4 units)
- Input 3: §bGold Ingot§f (`ingotGold`, 1 unit)
- Input 4: §bSilver Ingot§f (`ingotSilver`, 1 unit)
- Time: 1 RF/t baseline, Power: 1 RF/t

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bN-Type Doped Silicon§f → requires a §bSilicon Boule§f sliced into a §bSilicon Wafer§f in an §bNC Manufactory§f, then §bFission Irradiator§f for neutron doping.
- §bRedstone§f → from standard Minecraft redstone ore.
- §bGold Ingot§f → from gold ore processing.
- §bSilver Ingot§f → from silver ore (Thermal Foundation / NC) processing.

§6Direct Descendants (graph-confirmed)§f:
The Basic Processor is consumed in these QMD recipes:
- §bLinear Accelerator Controller§f (`qmd:linear_accelerator_controller`)
- §bAccelerator Computer Port§f (`qmd:accelerator_computer_port`)
- §bSilicon Tracker Detector§f (`qmd:particle_chamber_detector:1`)
- §bAdvanced Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:5`, via NC Assembler)
- §bBeam Meter§f (`qmd:beam_meter`)
- §bTarget Chamber Controller§f (`qmd:target_chamber_controller`)

§6Why the Basic Processor Matters§f:
- It is the §broot of the processor chain§f — every QMD machine uses a processor as the controller brain.
- It is the §beasiest processor to manufacture§f, requiring only §bN-Type Doped Silicon§f and basic Ingots.
- It is the §bgate to LINAC-class machines§f — without it, you cannot build a §bLinear Accelerator§f, §bTarget Chamber§f, or §bAccelerator Computer Port§f.

§eTip§f: Set up a §cbulk Basic Processor production line§f as soon as you have a stable §bFission Reactor§f + §bFission Irradiator§f pipeline for N-Type Doped Silicon. The Basic Processor is the foundation for everything in the QMD controller tree, and most of your §cearly-game QMD builds§f will consume them rapidly.
